author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Shipped in c7d9683a. `crosslink dashboard discover [--root

...] [--depth N] [--track]` walks a bounded set of dev roots, matches directories that have BOTH `.git` and `.crosslink/` at the root, skips the usual noise list (node_modules/target/.venv/.cache/hidden dirs), and reports a SLUG/TRACKED?/PATH table. With --track it promotes new hits via the existing projects::track entry point. Symlink-loop defence via canonical-path visited-set; doesn't follow symlinks. 5 unit tests in a temp-dir fixture. Verified against the user's $HOME: found 3 repos (forecast-bio/crosslink, dollspace-gay/OpenClaudia, dollspace-gay/ferrotorch), --track promoted the two new ones, all three tiles populated on the live dashboard within one poll tick.
